__fixture__.name: repair_card_managed_request_entitlement_refresh
__fixture__.scenario: Managed-provider repair card promoted from a diagnostics card after the entitlement snapshot's grace state expired and a managed-only feature surfaced unavailable_pending_entitlement_refresh. The card requests a fresh entitlement-snapshot pull from the managed control plane; the only side effect is requests_entitlement_refresh, which lands in the managed provider's audit trail. Scope is scope_managed_provider_only because the action's effect is observable in the managed control plane, not the local device. Authority is managed_provider_authority and consent is approval_ticket_required because the managed provider's policy requires an approval ticket on entitlement-refresh-on-demand.

title_label_text: Request entitlement refresh from managed provider
what_changes_sentence: Sends a refresh request to the managed control plane so the entitlement snapshot, plan / feature rows, and grace state re-resolve from the current source.
where_it_applies_sentence: Applies to the managed control plane only; no local setting, workspace pin, or org policy bundle is changed by this request.

evidence_links.evidence_note: Stale snapshot whose refresh state is past grace; managed-only features marked unavailable_pending_entitlement_refresh.
Posture object naming the managed_workspace identity mode and the bound active_policy_bundle_ref.
Approval ticket required by managed provider policy for on-demand entitlement refresh.
